mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_permission WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_permission (id, name, code, type, description, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{code}, #{type}, #{description}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_permission SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, type = #{type}, description = #{description}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_date = #{updateDate}, flag = #{flag} WHERE id = #{id}
